'''âz-n-j''' ('''zanaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stance|stance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stance|stance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-n-j
|-
! Lemma
| zanaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zanajithi|zanajithi]] || [[word:zanajiji|zanajiji]] || [[word:zanajishi|zanajishi]] || [[word:zanaji|zanaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanajuthuth|zanajuthuth]] || [[word:zanajujuj|zanajujuj]] || [[word:zanajushush|zanajushush]] || [[word:zanaj|zanaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanajuthu|zanajuthu]] || [[word:zanajuju|zanajuju]] || [[word:zanajushu|zanajushu]] || [[word:zanaju|zanaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanajufuth|zanajufuth]] || [[word:zanajufuj|zanajufuj]] || [[word:zanajufush|zanajufush]] || [[word:zanajuf|zanajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zanajethe|zanajethe]] || [[word:zanajeje|zanajeje]] || [[word:zanajeshe|zanajeshe]] || [[word:zanaje|zanaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanajothoth|zanajothoth]] || [[word:zanajojoj|zanajojoj]] || [[word:zanajoshosh|zanajoshosh]] || [[word:zanaj|zanaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanajotho|zanajotho]] || [[word:zanajojo|zanajojo]] || [[word:zanajosho|zanajosho]] || [[word:zanajo|zanajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanajofoth|zanajofoth]] || [[word:zanajofoj|zanajofoj]] || [[word:zanajofosh|zanajofosh]] || [[word:zanajof|zanajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zanajĂŠthĂŠ|zanajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zanajĂŠjĂŠ|zanajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zanajĂŠshĂŠ|zanajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zanajĂŠ|zanajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanajathath|zanajathath]] || [[word:zanajajaj|zanajajaj]] || [[word:zanajashash|zanajashash]] || [[word:zanaj|zanaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanajatha|zanajatha]] || [[word:zanajaja|zanajaja]] || [[word:zanajasha|zanajasha]] || [[word:zanaja|zanaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanajafath|zanajafath]] || [[word:zanajafaj|zanajafaj]] || [[word:zanajafash|zanajafash]] || [[word:zanajaf|zanajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zanajasha|zanajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozanajasha|gozanajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizanajasha|gokizanajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zanajnĂŒsha|zanajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozanajnknĂŒsha|gozanajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizanajnĂŒsha|gokizanajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zanajshĂ«sha|zanajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozanajnkshĂ«sha|gozanajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizanajshĂ«sha|gokizanajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zanajrosha|zanajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozanajnkrosha|gozanajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizanajrosha|gokizanajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zanajmusha|zanajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozanajnkmusha|gozanajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizanajmusha|gokizanajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zanajsherasha|zanajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozanajnksherasha|gozanajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizanajsherasha|gokizanajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zanajngasha|zanajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozanajnkngasha|gozanajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizanajngasha|gokizanajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zanajyasha|zanajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozanajnkyasha|gozanajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizanajyasha|gokizanajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zanajyamasha|zanajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozanajnkyamasha|gozanajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizanajyamasha|gokizanajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zanajnĂŒshĂ«sha|zanajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozanajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozanajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizanajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizanajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zanajnĂŒrosha|zanajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozanajnknĂŒrosha|gozanajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizanajnĂŒrosha|gokizanajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zanajnĂŒmusha|zanajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozanajnknĂŒmusha|gozanajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizanajnĂŒmusha|gokizanajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zanajshĂ«nĂŒsha|zanajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozanajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozanajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizanajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizanajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zanajshĂ«rosha|zanajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozanajnkshĂ«rosha|gozanajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizanajshĂ«rosha|gokizanajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zanajshĂ«musha|zanajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozanajnkshĂ«musha|gozanajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizanajshĂ«musha|gokizanajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zanajronĂŒsha|zanajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozanajnkronĂŒsha|gozanajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizanajronĂŒsha|gokizanajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zanajroshĂ«sha|zanajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozanajnkroshĂ«sha|gozanajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizanajroshĂ«sha|gokizanajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zanajromusha|zanajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozanajnkromusha|gozanajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizanajromusha|gokizanajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zanajmunĂŒsha|zanajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozanajnkmunĂŒsha|gozanajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizanajmunĂŒsha|gokizanajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zanajmushĂ«sha|zanajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozanajnkmushĂ«sha|gozanajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizanajmushĂ«sha|gokizanajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zanajmurosha|zanajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozanajnkmurosha|gozanajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizanajmurosha|gokizanajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zanaj|zanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠnĂŠj|zĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozanaj|hozanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠnĂŠj|hozĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozanaj|hohozanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠnĂŠj|hohozĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzanaj|nĂŒzanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠnĂŠj|nĂŒzĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzanaj|nĂŒnĂŒzanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠnĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzanaj|nĂŻzanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠnĂŠj|nĂŻzĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzanaj|nĂŻnĂŻzanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠnĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzanaj|luzanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠnĂŠj|luzĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzanaj|luluzanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠnĂŠj|luluzĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizanaj|lizanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠnĂŠj|lizĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizanaj|lilizanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠnĂŠj|lilizĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozanaj|kozanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠnĂŠj|kozĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozanaj|kokozanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠnĂŠj|kokozĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezanaj|kezanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠnĂŠj|kezĂŠnĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezanaj|kekezanaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠnĂŠj|kekezĂŠnĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
